title: Craftsvilla Global Group is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Craftsvilla Global Group is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Craftsvilla Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Dhanbad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Craftsvilla Global Group:
Craftsvilla Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Craftsvilla Global Group!
